_doc: Stronghold (STH) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/sth.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 55C / 44U / 44R / 0M. Collation: Belgian striped (10x11 and 12x11 sheets). Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Small set printed in USA and Belgium (US openings not identified during research). 36 packs per box. Pre-1999, no foils. Only Belgian pack anatomy documented.
